```prompt
---
agent: agent
description: "Implement contrastive learning for representation learning"
---
# Contrastive Learning
## Task
Implement contrastive learning for better representations.
## Requirements
1. Create positive and negative pairs. 2. Implement contrastive loss (InfoNCE, triplet).
3. Use hard negative mining. 4. Train encoder on contrastive objective.
5. Evaluate representation quality on downstream tasks.
## Constraints
- Batch size matters for contrastive learning. Hard negatives improve quality. Temperature tuning.
## Success Criteria
- Representations capture semantic similarity. Downstream task performance improved.
```
